title: [InstCombine] SimplifyDemandedBits: add basic bitcast handling, Fixes #173780
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/simplify-demanded-bits-bitcast.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/simplify-demanded-bits-bitcast.ll
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..26c2e8927bda8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/simplify-demanded-bits-bitcast.ll
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+; RUN: opt -passes=instcombine -S %s | FileCheck %s
+
+define i1 @peek_through_bitcast_signbit(float %f) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @peek_through_bitcast_signbit
+; CHECK: %cmp = fcmp olt float %f, 0.000000e+00
+; CHECK: ret i1 %cmp
+
+  %bc = bitcast float %f to i32
+  %cmp = icmp slt i32 %bc, 0
+  ret i1 %cmp
+}
